MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, HSIU YING HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, LAINTIFF HSIU YUNG NG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION DOES NOT DISPOSE OF AN ENTIRE CAUSE OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT BECAUSE IT DOES NOT PRESENT EVIDENCE TO CALCULATE DAMAGES. IT DOES NOT DISPOSE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS ENTITLED TO AT LEAST SOME RELIEF. COUNSEL FOR BOTH SIDES ARE DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1110(B)(4) AND 3.1113(F). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
